build_order.description: Recommended implementation order for Go rewrite

phases.name: Database & Types
phases.rationale: Foundation types with no dependencies. DTOs are pure value objects; models map to database tables.

phases.name: Repository Layer
phases.rationale: Data access wrapping raw SQL/pgx. Models have no cross-model methods that need services.

phases.name: Use Cases / Actions
phases.rationale: Business logic depending only on repos + types. Actions form the core domain layer.

phases.name: Services
phases.rationale: Higher-level workflows. Services coordinate multiple actions but introduce no new domain logic.

phases.name: HTTP Handlers
phases.rationale: Depends on services + actions. Includes authentication, authorization, request validation.

phases.name: MCP Server
phases.rationale: Depends on services + actions. Separate transport layer from REST API.

phases.name: OAuth Server
components: OIDC integration (discovery, token validation, user info)
phases.rationale: Depends on repos + HTTP handlers. Complex subsystem best built as a unit.

phases.name: Background Jobs & Extractors
components: 5 document extractors (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, HTML, Markdown)
phases.rationale: Can be implemented last. Extractors are isolated; jobs are async wrappers around actions.

components.name: Document
components.note: Central domain entity, used across all document-related layers

components.name: ExternalService
components.note: Used by Kiwix, Confluence, health checks, and MCP tools

components.name: GitTemplate
components.note: Used by all git template actions, controllers, and MCP tools

components.name: DocumentService
components.note: Used by DocumentController and 4 MCP tools

components.name: ExternalServiceManager
components.note: Gateway for all external API clients (Kiwix, Confluence)

components.name: TokenHashingService
components.note: Used by 5 OAuth actions and 4 models (static findBy methods)

circular_dependency_check.notes: No circular dependencies detected. Dependency flow is strictly: Models <- DTOs <- Actions <- Services <- Controllers/MCP Tools/Jobs. The only cross-action dependency is ReindexMissingDocumentsAction -> IndexDocumentInMeilisearchAction and CleanupSoftDeletedDocumentsAction -> PermanentlyDeleteDocumentAction, both within the same domain (Documents/SearchIndex) and both unidirectional.
